FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Hawkish Fed and Intervention Bias Lift Pair Above MA20
tldr_points: Fed inflation concerns boost USD strength
Japan's ¥11.7tn FX intervention supports USD/JPY upside
Price above MA20 signals short-term bullish momentum
FX.excerpt: Fed hawkish tone and Japanese FX intervention drive USD/JPY above MA20 targeting further upside.
FX.comment: Price above MA20 supported by hawkish Fed and yen‑selling interventions

tldr_points: Price trading above rising MA20 indicates short-term bullish momentum.
Dell, NetApp earnings beat and US‑Iran deal hopes lift tech sentiment.
Asia‑Europe gains reinforce risk‑on environment for equities.

STOCKS.comment: Price above MA20 with bullish momentum and supportive fundamentals
